pi_items.source: Task setup script creates this job with this name (setup_task.sh line 38)

privileged_info_summary: The Timestamper plugin (plugin ID: 'timestamper') is a real Jenkins plugin that adds timestamps to console output. The wrapper class used to implement this functionality is hudson.plugins.timestamper.TimestamperBuildWrapper. The task creates a synthetic job named 'QA-Test-Runner' with simulated test output to verify the plugin's timestamp functionality. All three metadata claims regarding the plugin and wrapper class names have been independently verified against official Jenkins documentation.
